formulas.name: Attack (no accuracy)
formulas.description: Standard attack roll. Edit +0 to your total modifier.

formulas.name: Accuracy 1
formulas.description: Add highest of 1d6. Edit +0 to your modifier.

formulas.name: Accuracy 2
formulas.description: Add highest of 2d6. Edit +0 to your modifier.

formulas.name: Difficulty 1
formulas.description: Subtract highest of 1d6. Edit +0 to your modifier.
